normalization.notes: Store encoded cuneiform signs in NFC and preserve transliteration sign values side by side. Do not normalize polyvalent signs to a single reading. Keep broken signs and uncertain readings in review metadata.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: individual signs, determinatives, logograms, syllabic sign values, word dividers, and transliteration labels
segmentation.notes: Cuneiform reading cannot treat Unicode code points as stable words. Segment visible signs separately from sign values and require specialist review for damaged tablets, edition conventions, and period-specific sign forms.

sources.notes: Encoded cuneiform signs for infrastructure and rendering checks only.
